en: And as he came out of the temple, one of his disciples said to him, "Look, Teacher, what wonderful stones and what wonderful buildings!"
zh: 耶穌從殿裡出來的時候，有一個門徒對他說：“老師，請看，這是多麼美好的石頭！多麼美好的建築！”

en: And Jesus said to him, "Do you see these great buildings? There will not be left here one stone upon another that will not be thrown down."
zh: 耶穌對他說：“你看見這些偉大的建築嗎？將來必沒有一塊石頭留在另一塊石頭上面，每一塊都要拆下來。”

en: And as he sat on the Mount of Olives opposite the temple, Peter and James and John and Andrew asked him privately,
zh: 耶穌在橄欖山上，面對聖殿坐著，彼得、雅各、約翰和安得烈私下問他：

en: "Tell us, when will these things be, and what will be the sign when all these things are about to be accomplished?"
zh: “請告訴我們，甚麼時候會有這些事呢？這一切事將要成就的時候有甚麼預兆呢？”

en: And Jesus began to say to them, "See that no one leads you astray.
zh: 耶穌就告訴他們說：“你們要小心，不要被人迷惑。

en: Many will come in my name, saying, 'I am he!' and they will lead many astray.
zh: 有許多人要來，假冒我的名說‘我就是基督’，並且要迷惑許多的人。

en: And when you hear of wars and rumors of wars, do not be alarmed. This must take place, but the end is not yet.
zh: 你們聽見戰爭和戰爭的風聲，也不要驚慌，這是免不了的，不過，結局還沒有到。

en: For nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. There will be earthquakes in various places; there will be famines. These are but the beginning of the birth pains.
zh: 一個民族要起來攻打另一個民族，一個國家要起來攻打另一個國家，到處要有地震，有饑荒，這些不過是痛苦的開始。

en: "But be on your guard. For they will deliver you over to councils, and you will be beaten in synagogues, and you will stand before governors and kings for my sake, to bear witness before them.
zh: 但你們要小心！因為人要把你們交給公議會，你們要在會堂裡被鞭打，又要為我的緣故站在總督和君王面前，向他們作見證。

en: And the gospel must first be proclaimed to all nations.
zh: 然而福音必須先傳給萬民。

en: And when they bring you to trial and deliver you over, do not be anxious beforehand what you are to say, but say whatever is given you in that hour, for it is not you who speak, but the Holy Spirit.
zh: 人把你們捉去送官的時候，用不著預先思慮要說甚麼，到那時候賜給你們甚麼話，你們就說甚麼，因為說話的不是你們，而是聖靈。

en: And brother will deliver brother over to death, and the father his child, and children will rise against parents and have them put to death.
zh: 弟兄要出賣弟兄，父親要出賣兒子，甚至把他們置於死地；兒女要悖逆父母，害死他們。

en: And you will be hated by all for my name's sake. But the one who endures to the end will be saved.
zh: 你們為我的名，要被眾人恨惡，然而堅忍到底的必然得救。

en: "But when you see the abomination of desolation standing where it ought not to be (let the reader understand), then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains.
zh: “當你們看見‘那造成荒涼的可憎者’，站在不該站的地方 ，那時，住在猶太的應當逃到山上；

en: Let the one who is on the housetop not go down, nor enter his house, to take anything out,
zh: 在房頂的不要下來，也不要進到屋子裡拿甚麼東西；

en: and let the one who is in the field not turn back to take his cloak.
zh: 在田裡的也不要回去取衣服。

en: And alas for women who are pregnant and for those who are nursing infants in those days!
zh: 當那些日子，懷孕的和乳養孩子的有禍了！

en: Pray that it may not happen in winter.
zh: 你們應當祈求，不要讓這些事在冬天發生。

en: For in those days there will be such tribulation as has not been from the beginning of the creation that God created until now, and never will be.
zh: 因為那些日子必有災難，這是從 神創世的開始到現在未曾有過的，以後也必不會再有。

en: And if the Lord had not cut short the days, no human being would be saved. But for the sake of the elect, whom he chose, he shortened the days.
zh: 如果不是主減少那些日子，沒有一個人可以存活；但是為了自己的選民，他必使那些日子減少。

en: And then if anyone says to you, 'Look, here is the Christ!' or 'Look, there he is!' do not believe it.
zh: 那時，如果有人對你們說：‘看哪，基督在這裡！看哪，他在那裡！’你們不要信。

en: False christs and false prophets will arise and perform signs and wonders, to lead astray, if possible, the elect.
zh: 因為必有假基督和假先知出現，行神蹟和奇事，如果可以的話，連選民也要迷惑了。

en: But be on guard; I have told you all things beforehand.
zh: 所以你們應當小心！我已經事先把一切都告訴你們了。

en: "But in those days, after that tribulation, the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give its light,
zh: “當那些日子，在那災難以後， 太陽就變黑了， 月亮也不發光，

en: and the stars will be falling from heaven, and the powers in the heavens will be shaken.
zh: 眾星從天墜落， 天上的萬象震動。

en: And then they will see the Son of Man coming in clouds with great power and glory.
zh: 那時，他們要看見人子，滿有能力和榮耀，駕著雲降臨；

en: And then he will send out the angels and gather his elect from the four winds, from the ends of the earth to the ends of heaven.
zh: 他要差派天使，把他的選民從四方，從地極直到天邊，都招聚來。

en: "From the fig tree learn its lesson: as soon as its branch becomes tender and puts out its leaves, you know that summer is near.
zh: “你們應該從無花果樹學個功課：樹枝發出嫩芽長出葉子的時候，你們就知道夏天近了。

en: So also, when you see these things taking place, you know that he is near, at the very gates.
zh: 同樣，你們甚麼時候看見這些事發生，就知道他已經近在門口了。

en: Truly, I say to you, this generation will not pass away until all these things take place.
zh: 我實在告訴你們，這一切都必會發生，然後這世代才會過去。

en: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will not pass away.
zh: 天地都要過去，但我的話決不會廢去。

en: "But concerning that day or that hour, no one knows, not even the angels in heaven, nor the Son, but only the Father.
zh: “至於那日子和時間，沒有人知道，連天上的天使和子也不知道，只有父知道。

en: Be on guard, keep awake. For you do not know when the time will come.
zh: 你們要小心，要警醒，因為你們不知道那日期甚麼時候來到。

en: It is like a man going on a journey, when he leaves home and puts his servants in charge, each with his work, and commands the doorkeeper to stay awake.
zh: 這就像一個人出外遠行，把責任 一一地交給他的僕人，又吩咐看門的要警醒。

en: Therefore stay awake- for you do not know when the master of the house will come, in the evening, or at midnight, or when the cock crows, or in the morning-
zh: 所以你們要警醒，因為你們不知道家主甚麼時候來到，也許在黃昏，也許在半夜，也許在雞叫時，也許在清晨。

en: lest he come suddenly and find you asleep.
zh: 恐怕他忽然來到，發現你們正在睡覺。

en: And what I say to you I say to all: Stay awake."
zh: 我對你們所說的話，也是對眾人說的，‘你們要警醒’。”
